div.style: position: absolute; top: 0; right: 0; background: #ffb31a; color: white; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; border-bottom-left-radius: 4px;
position: absolute; top: 0; right: 0; background: #00cc00; color: white; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; border-bottom-left-radius: 4px;
overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: normal; word-break: break-word;

span.style: text-align: left; margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 15px;

div.style: margin-top: 0; color: #555; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px;
margin-top: 20px; padding: 10px; background-color: #F5F5F5; border-radius: 4px; text-align: right;

span.style: color: #505050; font-weight: bold; display: inline-flex; align-items: center;

div.style: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 25px;

label.string: The skill you will develop with this goal.

div.span: [What exactly do you want to achieve?]

field.name: specific_goal
field.placeholder: e.g. learning to program with python
field.style: width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #dddddd; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 5px;

div.span: [How do you know your progress is good?]

field.name: measurable_goal
field.placeholder: e.g. Add two features per week.
field.style: width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #dddddd; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 5px;

div.span: [What makes you sure you can do it?]

field.name: achievable_goal
field.placeholder: e.g. I have a study group.
field.style: width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #dddddd; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 5px;

field.name: relevant_goal
field.style: width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #dddddd; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 5px;

field.name: timed_goal
field.style: width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #dddddd; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 5px;

field.name: goal_name
field.placeholder: e.g. Learn Python and build an app.
field.style: width: 100%; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #dddddd; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 25px;

button.name: action_view_lesson
button.help: Quickly access and manage all lessons learned attached to this specific goal.

button.name: action_view_tasks
button.help: Tasks are the actionable steps you take to achieve your goal.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; color: #555; margin-down: 0;

div.label: Specific: [What exactly do you want to achieve?]
Achievable: [what makes you sure you can do it?]
Relevant: [Why is it important to you? (think of your motivation)]

button.name: action_complete_goal
button.help: Once a goal is complete, it's finalized. You can't add more tasks or modify anything on it, but you can record your lessons learned

div.style: border: 2px solid #dcdcdc; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: #fdfdfd;
div.label: Lesson Title
What Worked Well For You This Time?

field.name: lesson_worked
field.placeholder: Write 'None' if Nothing Comes to Mind.

div.label: What Would You Do Differently Next Time?

field.name: lesson_change
field.placeholder: Write 'None' if Nothing Comes to Mind.

div.label: What's Something New You've Learned?

field.name: lesson_learned
field.placeholder: Write 'None' if Nothing Comes to Mind.

div.label: Anything Else on Your Mind? (Optional)

div.style: border: 1px solid #dcdcdc; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); background-color: #fdfdfd;
div.label: Lesson Title
What Worked Will For You This Time?

field.name: lesson_worked
field.placeholder: Write 'None' if Nothing Comes to Mind.

div.label: What Would you Do Differently Next Time?

field.name: lesson_change
field.placeholder: Write 'None' if Nothing Comes to Mind.

div.label: What's Something New You've Learned?

field.name: lesson_learned
field.placeholder: Write 'None' if Nothing Comes to Mind.

div.label: Anything Else on Your Mind? (Optional)

header.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: start; margin-bottom: 10px;

h6.style: font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.4; color: #333; word-break: break-word;

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-top: 10px;
position: absolute; bottom: 10px; right: 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #666;

header.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: start; margin-bottom: 10px;

h6.style: font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.4; color: #333; word-break: break-word;

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-top: 10px;
position: absolute; bottom: 10px; right: 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #666;

field.name: description
field.placeholder: Write notes to help you with the task (tracking, important details...)
